required.fields: Missing required "fields" array with at least one field definition.

$error.additionalProperties: Unknown top-level property. Allowed: version, fields, js_wait_selector, page_timeout_s.

$error.const: Schema version must be the string "1".
$error.type: Schema version must be the string "1".

$error.minItems: "fields" must contain at least one field definition.
$error.maxItems: "fields" can contain at most 100 field definitions.

$error.type: Each field entry must be a JSON object.

required.name: Field is missing the required "name" property.
required.type: Field is missing the required "type" property (one of: string, number, boolean, array).
required.extractors: Field is missing the required "extractors" array.
required.*: Field is missing a required property.

$error.additionalProperties: Field contains an unknown property. Allowed: name, type, item_type, required, extractors, transform.

$error.pattern: Field name must use only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores, starting with a letter or underscore (e.g. "title", "review_count").
$error.maxLength: Field name must be at most 64 characters.
$error.type: Field name must be a string.

$error.enum: Field type must be one of: string, number, boolean, array.
$error.type: Field type must be a string.

$error.minItems: "extractors" must contain at least one extractor.

$error.type: Each extractor must be a JSON object (e.g. {"strategy": "css", "selector": "h1"}).

required.strategy: Extractor is missing the required "strategy" property. Use one of: css, xpath, schema_org, microdata, meta, json_ld.
required.*: Extractor is missing a required property.

$error.oneOf: Extractor is not valid for this strategy. Check that all required properties are present (css/xpath need "selector"; schema_org needs "schema_type" and "path"; microdata needs "itemprop"; meta needs "property"; json_ld needs "path").
